confirmation.detail: inbox envelope env_46558519-ea7d-4330-80fd-bf4ae3a38e0d read back as promoted

payload.local_mitigation: Added User Site operator-surface aliases narada-andrey.builder and spoken narada andrey builder -> narada-andrey.Bob. This is only a local mitigation; task CLI roster resolution still belongs upstream.
non_goals: Do not make role names naming authority for durable identities.
Do not create a second identity named narada-andrey.builder when narada-andrey.Bob is the actual identity.
Do not resolve across Sites unless the target Site/locus is explicit.

observed_case.current_failure: narada task work-next --agent narada-andrey.builder fails with agent_not_in_roster even though narada-andrey.Bob is the single builder-role agent.
observed_case.roster_fact: Exactly one builder-role agent is present in the target Site roster.

proposal: Introduce a canonical agent-address resolver before task command admission and operator-surface sends.
Treat a concrete agent id as direct identity authority when present in the target roster.
Treat role-shaped addresses such as <site>.builder, <site>.architect, or builder as role aliases scoped to the target Site only when they resolve to exactly one active roster agent with that role.
If no active agent has that role, fail closed with a repair suggestion to instantiate/admit an agent for the role or use an explicit concrete agent id.
If more than one active agent has that role, fail closed with the competing agent ids and require either an explicit concrete agent id or an explicit role-routing policy.
Expose the resolution in command output so downstream evidence records both requested_agent and resolved_agent.
payload.summary: The User Site exposed a coherence gap: narada-andrey.Bob is the actual builder-role agent in the roster, while narada-andrey.builder is the role-address the operator naturally expects to use. Task and operator-surface command paths should not require the operator to remember the concrete agent name when there is exactly one agent with the requested role in the target Site roster.
payload.title: Role aliases should resolve by exact-one roster cardinality
